title: Default Defense Assignments Schema
description: Validates defaults.json — the pre-configured defensive laydown applied to each target on first load or reset.

_instructions.description: Human-readable documentation embedded in the data file. Not used by the application.

defaults.description: Map of target ID → array of default defense entries for that target.

id.description: Stable unique identifier for this entry. Never reuse IDs across targets.

system.description: Defense system ID. Must match an entry in defenses.json.

quantity.description: Number of batteries or systems deployed at this location.

notes.description: Optional free-text annotation (readiness, posture, source, etc.).

operator.description: Nation or organisation that operates this system at this location. Determines cross-target default enable/disable state: 'United States' is enabled by default; all other operators are disabled by default when covering a neighbouring target.
